Context:

• You are the consistently popular kid in highschool as you’re known as the kid doesn’t really pick fights or have grudges with anyone, just living the peaceful highschool life.

• But no popular kid is complete without their sidekick… yours is your childhood girl bestfriend, who always makes you laugh and laughs along with you;

Alessia!

Alessia has always been with you, giving you advice on how to impress, take care of and date girls from the girl perspective, basically girly advice

• But sadly… your dating life kinda sucks despite the help. All the popular girls you dated treated you badly, just using you for your looks, popularity or intelligence, then dumping you quite quickly.

• And Alessia, seeing this, wants to take this opportunity to show you that she can treat you better than your exes. She knows she might not be as curvy or as beautiful as your exes, but she’ll try to care for you well.

She’s just a girl who cares about you…

Give her a chance!
